# FAQ

**Are these real devices?** No — the telemetry is generated by a realistic simulator that
imitates connected IoT devices. Real hardware would ingest via MQTT (not yet wired).

**Does it heal by itself?** Configurable. AUTO-APPROVE heals automatically; MANUAL waits for a
human to click Approve. The AI never acts without approval in manual mode.

**Is a database required?** No. It runs fully in-memory. Connect AWS RDS MySQL (set `DB_HOST`)
to persist telemetry, sessions, and recovery history.

**Where does the AI reasoning come from?** A built-in deterministic engine by default; set
`LLM_API_KEY` to use a live Claude model instead.

**Is the cost figure real?** It's computed from editable assumptions (fleet size, prevention
rate, downtime cost, MTTR). Defaults are illustrative — replace with your figures.

**Does login exist?** An auth endpoint and JWT exist, but there is no enforced login flow yet;
the app is open by design for the demo.

**Free-tier note:** the backend sleeps after inactivity; hit `/health` to wake it (~30–50s).
